raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tee Mahzitaji spihdehs
r: 3, ka tahs Debbes Spohschums /
un kas dauds us Taifnibu wedd /
43. ka tahs Swaigsn̄s muhschigi
muhscham.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tu Danijel / aptlep
tchohs Wahrdus / un afssehgele
fcho Grahmata / lihds pehdejam
Laikam / tad dauds meklehs tik-
kutchi / un ta Atsishchana pawai-
rofees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es Danijels skattijohs /
un rangi / dirvi zittt stahweja /
weens fcbai uppes Mallā / un
ohtrs ohtrā uppes Mallā.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas fazzija us to Wih-
ru / kas ar linnu Drehbehn bija
apgehrbts / kas wirs tahs uppes
stahweja : Zik ilgt tas buhs / ka-
mebr to Brihnumu Gals buhs ?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es dsirdeju to Wihru /
kas ar linnu Drehbehn bija ap-
gehrbts / un wirs tahs uppes
stahweja / tas pazehle fatwu lab-
bo un kreiso Rohku prett Deb-
besim / un swehreja pee ta / kas
muhschtgi dshwo / ka tas weenu
Laiku / zittus Laikus / un puhs
Laiku ta buhs / un kad to fweh-
tu Lauschu Iskaifischana buhs
pabeigta / tad ir wiffas tchihs
Leetns taps pabeigtns.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Scho dsirdeju es / bet ne
faprattu to / un es fazziju :
Mans Kungs / kursch buhs scho
Lectu Gals?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥsch fazzija :
Danijel prohjan / jo fchee W
ot irr apflehpti un afssehge
lihds pastaram Laikam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Dauds taps schfihsti
batti darriti un istihriti /
tee Besdeewigee besdeewigi
refees / un tee Besdeewigee
faprattibs / bet tee Sapra-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un no ta Laika / kad
deenskis Uppuris ktuhs atje-
un tahs Pobstischanas Ne-
tiba taps eezelta / buhs tul-
fchas divifimts un dewi-
mits Deenas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Gwehtigs irr tas /
fagatda / un afsneeds tut-
fchas trihssimts trihsdefmit-
peezas Deenas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tu no-eij / un
lihds ( tawas Dshwo-
nas ) Gallam / tamehr tas-
ateet / un tu atkat augfcha-
lees eeksch tawas Daltas-
rā Laikā.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
